$comment: MCP server config. Connect tools without writing bespoke integrations. NEVER hardcode credentials here - reference environment variables. Audit any public/community server before connecting it to anything with filesystem or credential access. Use a dev project with non-production data; prefer read-only.

example-stdio.$comment: Local subprocess over stdio - good for prototyping.

example-remote.$comment: Remote endpoint over HTTP/SSE - vetted, hosted server.
